positive: A minimalist geometric celestial scene. Focus on a stylized crescent moon partially overlapping a group of glowing, ethereal planets and constellations arranged in a symmetrical arc. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, and muted gold foil accents. The composition should feature clean, bold lines and abstract, elegant shapes, resembling a sophisticated mandala design. High contrast, deep velvet background, excellent print texture suitable for screen printing or sublimation. Style: Modern celestial engraving, Art Deco geometry, clean vector art aesthetic. Center composition, vibrant glow emanating from the stars, negative space is essential.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, text, signature, messy, graffiti, realistic photo, cropped, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor detail, logos
